name: add_integers
description: Adds two integers provided via spinboxes.
python_code:
from src.nodes.base import BaseNode

class AddIntegersNode(BaseNode):
    name = "Add Integers"
    
    def __init__(self):
        super().__init__()        # [AUTO-GENERATED-PORTS-START]
        self.add_input("a", "int", widget_type="int")
        self.add_input("b", "int", widget_type="int")
        self.add_output("result", "int")
        # [AUTO-GENERATED-PORTS-END]
        
    async def execute(self, inputs):
        a = int(inputs.get("a", 0))
        b = int(inputs.get("b", 0))
        return {"result": a + b}

def register_node():
    return AddIntegersNode
